metadata.name: gameframework
metadata.description: Game framework ported from BlockRooms - zone-based roguelike with betting mechanics and on-chain movement

instructions.name: buy_food
docs: Buy food to restore health

instructions.name: change_zone
docs: Change to a new zone (requires previous zone completion)

instructions.name: commit_player
docs: Commit player state from ER

instructions.name: delegate_game_session
docs: Delegate game session to ephemeral rollup

instructions.name: delegate_player
docs: Delegate player state to ephemeral rollup

instructions.name: delegate_player_stats
docs: Delegate player stats to ephemeral rollup

instructions.name: delegate_zone_state
docs: Delegate zone state to ephemeral rollup

instructions.name: end_game
docs: End the current game session

instructions.name: enter_room
docs: Enter a room in the current zone

instructions.name: initialize_config
docs: Initialize the game config (admin only, once per game)

instructions.name: initialize_player
docs: Initialize a new player

instructions.name: initialize_zone
docs: Initialize a zone for the player

instructions.name: move_player
docs: Record a grid movement step.
Frontend sends one transaction each time player crosses into a new grid cell.

instructions.name: place_bet
docs: Place a bet on whether the next enemy is real or fake

instructions.name: shoot_enemy
docs: Shoot an enemy and resolve the encounter

instructions.name: start_game
docs: Start a new game session

instructions.name: take_damage
docs: Take damage from an enemy

instructions.name: undelegate_player
docs: Undelegate player state from ER

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update game config (admin only)

errors.name: InvalidMovementDelta
errors.msg: Invalid movement delta. Use -1, 0, or 1 and avoid 0,0
